title: Powder Magazine
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guarded powder magazine doors, warning sigils, rain, torchlight, cinematic, no text
description:
A thick door, two locks, and a guard who looks like he sleeps with his spear.

A sign reads: NO OPEN FLAME.

You notice: someone has scraped wax from a seal recently.

investigate.text: The seal scrapings suggest tampering. If a fuse is already laid, the city might lose the gate before the enemy arrives.

title: Inside the Magazine
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, powder kegs stacked in rows, dim lantern behind shuttered glass, suspicious shadow, cinematic, no text
description:
Rows of kegs. The air is dry and wrong.

A shadow moves between stacks — too careful for a guard.

You catch the faint smell of burned cord: fuse.

choices.label: Step in and confront the intruder.
Quietly soak the fuse with my water skin.

title: Magazine Standoff
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, saboteur with flint and fuse near powder kegs, tense close quarters, cinematic, no text
description:
The intruder turns — a city man, not a goblin. He holds flint and cord like holy objects.

"You shouldn’t be here," he says. "This is bigger than you."

choices.label: Fight him before he lights anything.
Throw a smoke pellet and rush him.

title: A Dirty Confession
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, close-up parley in dim warehouse, nervous saboteur, fuse cord, cinematic, no text
description:
His eyes flick to the kegs.

"It’s not the goblins," he whispers. "It’s… a ‘friend of the docks’. They said the city must ‘change hands’ to survive. They said the gate wards are a lie."

choices.label: Accept his surrender and take evidence.

title: Secured Kegs
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, sealed powder kegs with fresh wax seals, guards arriving, relief and tension, cinematic, no text
description:
Guards arrive, breathless. You point to scraped seals, the fuse cord, the ledger page.

The captain’s messenger blanches. "If this had gone off…"

It didn’t. Not today.

talk.text: A guard captain nods grimly. "Report this to the council. And don’t leave the gate yard once the horns start."

choices.label: Report sabotage evidence to the council.

title: Factor’s Office
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, dock office with ledgers, sealing wax, fine chair, rain at window, cinematic, no text
description:
The office smells of wax, ink, and expensive soap. A man smiles like he’s never been hungry.

Factor Merris stands behind a ledger stack as if it’s a fortress.

talk.text: Merris’s smile is practiced. "I’m very busy."

title: Warrant Executed
imagePrompt: fantasy illustration, inked linework + painterly color, guards seizing ledgers, factor losing composure, wax seals, cinematic, no text
description:
His composure fractures when the warrant seal catches the light.

"This is absurd—" he begins.

A guard’s hand closes on his shoulder. The ledger pages you take feel heavier than coin.

choices.label: Arrest Merris and seize the ledger pages.
